_meta.source: appointments collapsed to patient reschedule-chains (episodes) -> lead, offline clinics
_meta.note: CLEAN funnel: 1 patient-intent = 1 booking (reschedule chains within 14d collapsed). seg=new(first-ever)|return(14d+ later). outcome=done if ever completed, else final state. resched=rework events (chain rows - 1), NOT demand. episodes=unique bookings/wk.
